articles.title: ‘Justin Can Retire!’ Paddy & DJ On Gaethje Retiring
Ilia Topuria Must Wait #ufc
articles.description: Ilia Topuria may have one of the strongest résumés in the UFC today, but Chael Sonnen doesn't believe he'll get an immediate rematch with Justin Gaethje. In this breakdown, Chael argues that Topuria's accomplishments already place him among the sport's elite. He even suggests that, if not for UFC timing and paperwork, Ilia could have simultaneously held the featherweight title, lightweight title, and BMF championship. Despite that, Chael thinks the UFC is unlikely to send him straight back into another title fight against Gaethje. The reason isn't that Topuria hasn't earned it—it's that Gaethje has options. After capturing the championship, Chael believes Justin has done enough to pursue fresh matchups rather than an immediate rematch. He also points out another major factor that could reshape the division: Conor McGregor. If McGregor returns, defeats Max Holloway, and follows through on his stated plan to fight twice, Chael believes a blockbuster showdown with Gaethje could become the UFC's priority. That scenario would push Topuria's title hopes further down the timeline, even if fans are eager to see him fight for gold again. According to Chael, the smartest move for Ilia is to heal, stay ready, and wait for the next championship opportunity. For more UFC analysis, Ilia Topuria updates, Justin Gaethje news, Conor McGregor coverage, and Chael Sonnen breakdowns, subscribe for daily MMA content. #UFC #IliaTopuria #JustinGaethje #ConorMcGregor #MaxHolloway #ChaelSonnen #MMA

articles.title: Josh Hokit’s Fast Track to the Belt  #ufc
articles.description: Chael Sonnen believes Josh Hoekstra is much closer to a UFC heavyweight title shot than most fans realize. In this breakdown, Chael explains why Hoekstra's path to championship gold may be just one fight away—or possibly even immediate. The biggest factor isn't Hoekstra himself. It's the uncertainty surrounding heavyweight champion Tom Aspinall. If Aspinall returns to defend against interim champion Ciryl Gane, Chael expects Hoekstra to stay active against another top contender while waiting for his opportunity. However, if Aspinall remains unavailable and the UFC decides not to book an immediate rematch involving Alex Pereira, Chael believes Gane could be elevated to undisputed champion. In that scenario, Hoekstra could find himself fighting for the heavyweight title much sooner than anyone expected. One thing Chael is confident about is Hoekstra's timeline. Whether his next fight is for the championship or one final eliminator, Chael doesn't see any realistic path where Hoekstra has to win multiple contender fights before competing for UFC gold. His long-term future looks exceptionally bright, and the heavyweight division may be on the verge of welcoming its next title challenger. For more UFC analysis, heavyweight news, Josh Hoekstra updates, and Chael Sonnen breakdowns, subscribe for daily MMA content. #UFC #JoshHoekstra #TomAspinall #CirylGane #AlexPereira #ChaelSonnen #MMA #HeavyweightTitle

Chael explains why an immediate rematch with Justin Gaethje is unlikely, how Charles Oliveira and Arman Tsarukyan complicate the title picture, and why timing could be just as important as the opponent. Should Ilia wait? Should he take another fight first? Chael breaks down every realistic path back to UFC gold. #IliaTopuria #JustinGaethje #CharlesOliveira #ArmanTsarukyan #UFC #chaelsonnen. articles.title: UFC Heavyweight Division is a Mess
articles.description: Jon Jones says he's feeling better than ever after stem cell treatment, training with Gable Steveson, and getting back into elite-level workouts. But Chael believes the bigger story isn't just Jon's comeback—it's the heavyweight division changing around him. Could Jon Jones really return? What happens if Gable Steveson rises faster than anyone expects? And has Alex Pereira already become the biggest heavyweight attraction in MMA? Chael breaks down Jon's future, Gable's rapid development, Tom Aspinall's current position, and why heavyweight has become the UFC's most fascinating division. #UFC #JonJones #GableSteveson #TomAspinall #AlexPereira #ChaelSonnen Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Why Are Dricus du Plessis and Kamaru Usman Fighting?
articles.description: Why are Dricus du Plessis and Kamaru Usman fighting—and what does the winner actually gain? Chael Sonnen breaks down one of the most intriguing matchups in MMA, questioning why this fight was made in the first place. With Kamaru Usman moving up to middleweight to face former champion Dricus du Plessis, Chael believes there's more happening behind the scenes than the UFC has revealed. Chael discusses Usman's impressive return against Joaquin Buckley, his controversial loss to Khamzat Chimaev, why he believes Usman deserved another opportunity, and how this fight impacts Sean Strickland, Nassourdine Imavov, Bo Nickal, and the future of the middleweight title picture. Is this simply a super fight... or is the UFC setting up something much bigger? #ChaelSonnen #DricusDuPlessis #KamaruUsman #UFC #MMA #DDP #SeanStrickland #KhamzatChimaev #BoNickal #Middleweight #UFCTitle Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Ask Uncle Chael: No Question Is Off Limits
articles.description: It's time for another edition of Ask Uncle Chael! This week, Chael Sonnen answers your biggest MMA questions, including whether Ilia Topuria should change after his recent loss, why Tom Aspinall's heavyweight future is still the biggest question in the UFC, whether Josh Hokit is the real deal, and if Alex Pereira should stay at heavyweight. Chael also breaks down weight cutting in MMA, explains why size isn't always an advantage, shares the hardest hitters he ever fought, discusses Colby Covington, Arman Tsarukyan, and Kamaru Usman at Real American Freestyle, plus answers a handful of completely unexpected fan questions. If you enjoy Chael's unfiltered opinions and behind-the-scenes insight into MMA, this episode of Ask Uncle Chael has something for everyone. #ChaelSonnen #AskUncleChael #UFC #MMA #IliaTopuria #TomAspinall #AlexPereira #JoshHokit #ColbyCovington #ArmanTsarukyan #KamaruUsman #RealAmericanFreestyleBad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Let me tell you why Max Holloway Is a Nightmare for Conor #ufc
articles.description: Can Conor McGregor really come back and defeat Max Holloway? Chael Sonnen believes the challenge is even bigger than most fans realize. In this breakdown, Chael explains why McGregor wouldn't just need to accomplish one historic feat—he would need to accomplish three. First, he'd have to defeat an elite contender outside of his competitive prime. Second, he'd need to prove he can return from a devastating leg injury that has dramatically affected other fighters who suffered similar setbacks. Third, he'd have to come back after years away from active competition and immediately thrive in a five-round championship-level fight. Chael makes it clear that this isn't criticism of McGregor. In fact, he openly says he's rooting for Conor to succeed. A successful comeback would be one of the most inspiring stories in combat sports history. The problem is the opponent. According to Chael, Holloway presents a uniquely difficult challenge because of his relentless pace, volume, and durability. He points to the damage Max inflicted on elite fighters throughout his career and argues that Holloway doesn't need one punch to hurt opponents—he overwhelms them with pressure over time. For Chael, this isn't simply about talent. It's about timing, mileage, injuries, and style matchups. And when all those factors are combined, Max Holloway may be the most difficult comeback opponent imaginable for Conor McGregor. For more UFC analysis, Conor McGregor updates, Max Holloway news, and Chael Sonnen breakdowns, subscribe for daily MMA content. #UFC #ConorMcGregor #MaxHolloway #ChaelSonnen #MMA #JustinGaethje #CombatSports #UFCReturn

articles.title: Does Alex Pereira Deserve an Immediate Rematch? #ufc
articles.description: Does Alex Pereira deserve an immediate rematch? Chael Sonnen believes the answer is yes—but whether he actually gets one is a completely different question. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to comments from Dana White regarding Pereira's controversial loss to Ciryl Gane. Dana pointed out that Pereira has built a reputation for accepting defeat without excuses, making his public objections to this result impossible to ignore. Chael notes that when a fighter like Pereira speaks up, people tend to listen. But deserving a rematch and receiving a rematch are not the same thing. Chael explains the difficult position the UFC finds itself in. Gane has already earned a massive fight with heavyweight champion Tom Aspinall, and forcing him to risk that opportunity again creates its own set of problems. Should Gane have to defend his position before getting the biggest fight of his career? Or should Pereira be given another chance immediately because of the controversy? That's where the debate gets complicated. Chael believes Pereira has a legitimate case for an immediate rematch, especially given the circumstances surrounding the fight. However, if Aspinall is healthy and ready to compete, the UFC may prioritize title unification over settling unfinished business. If Aspinall is unavailable, the entire conversation changes. For more UFC analysis, Alex Pereira updates, heavyweight news, and Chael Sonnen breakdowns, subscribe for daily MMA content. #UFC #AlexPereira #CirylGane #TomAspinall #DanaWhite #ChaelSonnen #MMA #HeavyweightTitle

articles.title: Is Tom Aspinall Really Coming Back?
articles.description: Is Tom Aspinall coming back—or is the heavyweight division about to change forever? Chael Sonnen breaks down the biggest unanswered question in the UFC heavyweight division. While Eddie Hearn continues suggesting Tom Aspinall may not return, Chael explains why he still believes the UFC heavyweight champion intends to honor his contract and fight again. Chael also discusses Tom's pay-per-view value, the Ciryl Gane rematch, why the UFC still needs Tom at the top of the division, and where undefeated contender Josh Hokit fits into the title picture if Tom doesn't return. Is Eddie Hearn creating leverage... or revealing the truth? #ChaelSonnen #TomAspinall #UFC #MMA #EddieHearn #CirylGane #DanaWhite #JoshHokit #Heavyweight #UFCHW Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: ‘Stay in shape or enjoy life?!’ Paddy Pimblett On His Weight
Why Ilia Topuria’s Road Back Won’t Be Easy #ufc
articles.description: Ilia Topuria may have entered the biggest fight of his career facing challenges that most fans never saw. In this breakdown, Chael Sonnen explains why Topuria's recent circumstances made an already difficult championship fight even tougher. Between significant time away from competition, major personal issues, and the demands that come with being one of the UFC's biggest stars, Chael believes Ilia was placed in an extraordinarily difficult position. Chael points out that Topuria's activity level has been limited, with relatively few cage appearances over the last several years. Then came the pressure of competing in a five-round main event in front of a massive audience. According to Chael, none of this should be viewed as an excuse. Instead, it's an honest look at the realities fighters face when life outside the cage affects preparation inside it. The recovery process may be just as challenging. Chael discusses the possibility of medical evaluations, healing from fight-related injuries, and the difficulty of maintaining elite conditioning while sidelined. For a fighter whose career is built around main events and championship opportunities, every month away from full training carries significant consequences. One thing Chael makes clear is that Topuria remains a headliner. Whether he's fighting for a title or not, he's expected to compete at the highest level over 25 minutes against the best fighters in the world. The question isn't whether he'll return—it's how he navigates the complex road back. For more UFC analysis, Ilia Topuria updates, and Chael Sonnen breakdowns, subscribe for daily MMA content. #UFC #IliaTopuria #ChaelSonnen #MMA #UFCTitleFight #CombatSports #MainEvent #FightAnalysis

articles.title: Ilia vs Arman for a Vacant UFC Title? #ufc
articles.description: What if Justin Gaethje does the one thing almost no fighter ever does—walk away at the top? In this breakdown, Chael Sonnen explores a scenario that would completely reshape the UFC lightweight division. After capturing championship gold, Gaethje now faces a decision that legends rarely get to make. Does he retire as champion, following the path of Khabib Nurmagomedov and Georges St-Pierre, or does he continue fighting until the sport eventually forces the decision for him? Chael argues that many fighters who stay too long end up regretting it. If Gaethje were to retire and vacate the title, the UFC's next move seems obvious. Former champion Ilia Topuria would almost certainly find himself fighting for the vacant belt, and the most likely opponent would be top contender Arman Tsarukyan. Chael also discusses Topuria's difficult road back to contention. Between personal challenges, relocating internationally, and adapting to a new training environment, Ilia has been forced to navigate obstacles that most champions never face. Yet despite those challenges, Chael believes there is virtually no scenario where Topuria returns in anything other than a UFC main event. Whether Gaethje stays or goes, the future of the lightweight division may come down to one blockbuster matchup: Topuria vs. Tsarukyan. For more UFC analysis, Justin Gaethje news, Ilia Topuria updates, and Chael Sonnen breakdowns, subscribe for daily MMA content. #UFC #JustinGaethje #IliaTopuria #ArmanTsarukyan #Khabib #GeorgesStPierre #ChaelSonnen #MMA

articles.title: Spencer Lee Deserves More Respect
articles.description: Final X delivered another unforgettable night of wrestling, and Chael Sonnen is breaking down the biggest storylines from one of the most important events of the year. From Spencer Lee's dominant performance to Levi Haines' breakout moment, Chael discusses the athletes who impressed him most and the competitors who may be shaping the future of Team USA. Chael also dives into Stephen Buchanan's incredible rise in freestyle wrestling, James Green's remarkable comeback, Kyle Dake continuing to defy history, and why Spencer Lee continues to face unfair criticism despite winning at the highest level. Plus, what these results could mean for future World Championships and the road to the 2028 Olympic Games. #Wrestling #FinalX #SpencerLee #KyleDake #LeviHaines #StephenBuchanan #JamesGreen #TeamUSA #OlympicWrestling #ChaelSonnen Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench
